title: nabalus angustilobus
intro: Nabalus angustilobus, also known as Narrow-leaved Rattlesnake Root, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family that is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. It is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, treating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Nabalus angustilobus root is often dried and used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to leverage its medicinal properties.
